name: baseline_diffusion
description: Moderate benefit cost social influence trust and random seeding

name: high_social_influence
description: Peer influence is stronger and can create faster threshold crossing

name: high_cost_barrier
description: Costs are higher especially for cost-sensitive agents

name: targeted_seeding
description: Initial adopters are selected from high-degree network positions

name: network_fragmentation
description: Between-group bridge ties are scarce and diffusion may stall by cluster

name: trust_and_resistance
description: Trust is lower and cost pressure is slightly higher

name: bridge_and_equity_seeding
description: Seeds include high-barrier and highly connected agents to improve distributional reach
